artifact.description: Enterprise SaaS agreement template with AI-acceptable-use addendum, data processing agreement, and SLA schedule

ai_assistance.description: Drafted initial AI-acceptable-use addendum based on existing data processing agreement structure and provided regulatory guidance documents

review.notes: Revised AI-generated liability limitation clauses to align with firm precedent. Strengthened indemnification language around model output accuracy.
Partner approval. Template approved for use with enterprise clients in US and EU jurisdictions.

governance.policy: Firm AI Usage Policy for Client Deliverables
